# Sample of real-world commands that should match a local rule. One per line.
# Comments (lines starting with #) are ignored by the coverage test.

# ── shell basics ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
ls
ls -la
ls -lh
ls src
pwd
whoami
id
hostname
uname -a
uptime
date
env
which node
mkdir -p dist
touch .gitkeep
cp package.json pkg.backup
mv foo.txt bar.txt
stat README.md
file LICENSE
echo hello
history

# ── filesystem ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
cat README.md
head -n 20 file.txt
tail -n 50 log.txt
tail -f app.log
wc -l src/*.ts
sort -u names.txt
uniq -c
diff a.txt b.txt
diff -u a.txt b.txt
md5sum file.bin
sha256sum file.bin
du -sh .
df -h
find . -name "*.ts"
find . -type f -name "*.md"
tree -L 2

# ── text ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
grep -r TODO src
grep -rn "export function" src
rg -n "TODO" .
rg --files
awk '{print $1}' file.txt
tr -d '\r' < file.txt
xxd -p binary.dat
jq '.' package.json
jq -r '.name' package.json

# ── process ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
ps aux
ps -ef
pgrep -f node
pidof node
kill -l

# ── network ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
ping -c 3 google.com
dig example.com
nslookup example.com
host example.com
whois example.com
ip a
netstat -tnlp
ss -tulpn
curl -I https://example.com
curl -s https://api.example.com/status

# ── git read-only ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
git status
git status -s
git st
git diff
git diff --staged
git diff --name-only
git log
git log --oneline
git log --oneline --graph
git log --oneline -n 10
git show HEAD
git branch
git branch -a
git branch -vv
git branch --show-current
git remote -v
git remote show origin
git config --list
git stash list
git ls-files
git blame src/router/index.ts
git reflog
git shortlog -sn
git describe --tags
git tag -l
git rev-parse HEAD
git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD
git merge-base main HEAD
git whatchanged -n 5
git worktree list
git submodule status
git fsck
git count-objects -vH

# ── git write ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
git add .
git add -A
git add -p
git add src/router/index.ts
git commit -m "fix: a thing"
git commit -am "chore: bump"
git commit --amend --no-edit
git checkout main
git checkout -b feature/x
git switch main
git switch -c feature/y
git restore --staged README.md
git merge feature/x
git merge --ff-only main
git pull
git pull --rebase
git push
git push origin main
git push -u origin feature/x
git push --force-with-lease
git push --tags
git fetch
git fetch --all --prune
git clone https://github.com/user/repo
git tag v1.0.0
git stash
git stash pop
git stash apply
git rebase main
git rebase --continue
git cherry-pick abc1234
git revert abc1234
git mv old.txt new.txt
git rm file.txt
git init

# ── gh ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

gh repo view
gh pr list
gh pr view 42
gh pr checkout 42
gh issue list
gh issue view 100
gh run list
gh workflow list
gh release list

# ── npm / yarn / pnpm / bun ───────────────────────────────────────────

npm i
npm ci

npm uninstall lodash

npm run build

npm run lint
npm list
npm ls
npm outdated
npm audit
npm view express
npm init -y
npm --version
npm whoami
npx vitest
yarn install
yarn add lodash
yarn add -D vitest
yarn remove lodash
yarn test
yarn build
yarn dev
yarn list
yarn outdated
yarn audit
yarn why lodash
yarn workspaces list
pnpm install
pnpm i
pnpm add zod
pnpm add -D vitest
pnpm remove lodash
pnpm test
pnpm build
pnpm dev
pnpm list
pnpm outdated
pnpm audit
pnpm store prune
pnpm why lodash
bun install
bun add zod
bun remove lodash
bun test
bun build
bun pm ls

# ── python ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
python -V
python3 --version
python -m http.server 8080
python -c "print(1)"
pip install requests
pip install -r requirements.txt
pip install -e .
pip uninstall requests
pip list
pip freeze
pip check
pytest
pytest -v
pytest -k test_foo
pytest --cov
python -m pytest
python -m unittest
poetry install
poetry add requests
poetry remove requests
poetry update
poetry show
poetry run pytest
uv sync
uv add requests
uv run pytest
uv pip list
conda list
conda env list
ruff check
ruff format .
black .
black --check
mypy src
pylint src
isort src
flake8 src

cargo doc
cargo tree
cargo update
rustc --version
rustup show

go run .
go test ./...
go test -v
go mod tidy
go mod download

go fmt ./...
go version
go env

rails routes

# ── docker / k8s ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
docker ps
docker ps -a
docker images
docker logs container
docker logs -f container
docker inspect container
docker stats --no-stream
docker build -t myimage .
docker pull alpine
docker tag a b
docker rm container
docker rmi image
docker run -it alpine
docker stop container
docker restart container
docker system df
docker info
docker volume ls
docker network ls
docker compose up -d
docker compose down
docker compose ps
docker compose logs
kubectl get pods
kubectl get svc
kubectl get deployments
kubectl get nodes
kubectl get ns
kubectl describe pod mypod
kubectl logs mypod
kubectl logs -f mypod
kubectl apply -f deploy.yaml
kubectl port-forward pod/mypod 8080:80
kubectl config get-contexts
kubectl config current-context
kubectl top pods
kubectl top nodes
kubectl version
kubectl cluster-info
helm list
helm version
helm repo list

markdownlint README.md

# ── editors / system / archive ────────────────────────────────────────
code .
code src/cli.ts
lscpu
lsmem
lsblk
free -h
vmstat
systemctl --user status
journalctl --user -n 50
tar -tf archive.tar.gz
tar -xzf archive.tar.gz
tar -czf out.tar.gz dir
zip -r out.zip dir
unzip archive.zip
unzip -l archive.zip
gzip file.txt
gunzip file.txt.gz
7z l archive.7z
7z x archive.7z

# ── natural language ──────────────────────────────────────────────────
run the tests
run tests
test it
build the project
build it
compile it
install dependencies
install deps
list dependencies
show dependencies
list files
show me the files
what's in this directory
what changed
show diff
show the diff
what branch am I on
current branch
show recent commits
who wrote this file src/cli.ts
search for TODO
find files named index.ts
what's running
disk usage
start the server
run dev
show running containers
list images
show pods
list services

az group list
az vm list
az aks list
az --version

gcloud config list
gcloud projects list
gcloud compute instances list
gcloud container clusters list
gcloud version

netlify status

heroku apps

heroku ps
fly status
fly apps list
flyctl status
railway status
supabase status

foreman start

kcat -L
rabbitmqctl status
